5:   // Hero title
6:   await expect(page.locator('h1')).toHaveText('lukaspitrik.cz');
7:   // Dark mode toggle
8:   const toggle = page.locator('#theme-toggle');
9:   await expect(toggle).toBeVisible();
10:   // Click toggle and check class changes
11:   await toggle.click();
12:   await expect(page.locator('html')).toHaveClass(/dark/);
13: });
